message:
feat(core): add bimap module for bidirectional O(1) key-value lookups

Two-way HashMap maintaining bijection invariant. Insertions that collide
on either side evict the old pairing. Supports inverse(), retain(),
serde, FromIterator. 30 inline tests + 32 property-based tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
